# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Write Kong configuration file (kong.conf) for production deployment. Set admin_listen to configure Admin API accessibility. Define proxy_listen for client traffic and database connection settings. This is for our Kong Gateway deployment.
# Category: kong_admin_api_exposed

kong_profiles = default

dataplane {
  host = %any%
  ports {
    admin = 8001
    api = 8000
    service = 8443
    tcp = 8003
    kongs = 8002
  }
}

admin_listen = 8001
admin_tls = false

service {
  name = my-service
  connect_timeout = 60000
  host = service-host
  port = service-port
}

tcp_services = []

plugins {
  force_https = true
  strip_path = true
}

upstreams {
  my_upstream {
    hosts = [my-service]
  }
}

routes {
  add_route = "any"
  path = "/api/*"
  services = [my-service]
  strip_path = true
  upstream = my_upstream
}

databases = {
  default = {
    host = db-host
    port = db-port
    user = db-user
    password = db-password
    database = db-name
  }
}

kong_cluster {
  node {
    id = "node1"
    kong_data_dir = "/var/lib/kong"
    kong_pidfile = "/var/run/kong/kong.pid"
    kong_logfile = "/var/log/kong/access.log"
    kong_loglevel = "info"
  }
}
